sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id Int32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'Hello, world!'), (2, 'Goodbye, world!'), (3, 'hEllO, Universe!');
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (num_id Int32, value Float32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY num_id;
SELECT * FROM test_strings WHERE positionCaseInsensitive(name, 'hello') != ALL (SELECT name FROM test_strings WHERE positionCaseInsensitive(name, 'goodbye'));
SELECT name, COUNT(*) FROM test_strings GROUP BY name HAVING positionCaseInsensitive(name, 'hello') IS NOT NULL;
SELECT name FROM test_strings WHERE positionCaseInsensitive(name, 'hEllO') != ALL (SELECT name FROM test_strings WHERE name IS NOT NULL);
SELECT num_id, SUM(value) FROM test_numbers GROUP BY num_id HAVING SUM(value) != ALL (SELECT value FROM test_numbers WHERE value IS NOT NULL);

WITH (SELECT name FROM test_strings WHERE positionCaseInsensitive(name, 'world') IS NOT NULL) AS subquery SELECT count(*) FROM subquery WHERE name != ALL (SELECT name FROM test_strings WHERE positionCaseInsensitive(name, 'hello'));
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT positionCaseInsensitive(name, 'hEllO') AS position_val FROM test_strings;
INSERT INTO temp_table SELECT positionCaseInsensitive(name, 'H') FROM test_strings WHERE name != ALL (SELECT name FROM test_strings WHERE name IS NULL);
SELECT DISTINCT positionCaseInsensitive(name, 'goodbye') as pos FROM test_strings WHERE pos IS NOT NULL;
